mappingAssumptions.filingStatus: Mapped profile filing_status=single to OpenTax general.filing_status=single.
mappingAssumptions.interest: Mapped synthetic interest income to one f1099int entry with box1=77.75.
mappingAssumptions.scheduleC: Mapped gross receipts and categorized expenses to one schedule_c entry. Software, bank fees, and professional education were retained as Part V other expenses.
mappingAssumptions.addTransaction: Modeled TADD by adding a Part V Schedule C expense of 24.99 in a second return; OpenTax has form entries, not a bookkeeping transaction ledger.
mappingAssumptions.estimatedPayments: Mapped total federal estimated payments of 1050.00 into four equal f1040es quarterly payments.
mappingAssumptions.charity: Cash charitable contributions were tested separately with schedule_a.force_itemized=true because the baseline standard deduction is larger than the contribution amount.
mappingAssumptions.mileage: Business miles were not converted to a deduction because the shared profile leaves mileage_rate_usd and mileage_deduction_usd null.

baseline.label: baseline_standard_deduction

entries.message: Form 1040, 'TotalPaymentsAmt' must be equal to the sum of the following: 'WithholdingTaxAmt' and 'EstimatedTaxPaymentsAmt' and 'EarnedIncomeCreditAmt' and 'AdditionalChildTaxCreditAmt' and 'RefundableAmerOppCreditAmt' and 'form8689Amt' and Schedule 3 (Form 1040), [ 'ReconciledPremiumTaxCreditAmt' and 'RequestForExtensionAmt' and 'ExcessSocSecAndTier1RRTATaxAmt' and 'TotalFuelTaxCreditAmt' and 'OtherPaymentsAmt' ].

On Form 2210, Part II, one of more of the following checkboxes must be checked: (Line A 'WaiverOfEntirePenaltyInd' or Line B 'WaiverOfPartOfPenaltyInd' or Line C 'AnnualizedIncomeMethodInd' or Line D 'ActuallyWithheldInd' or Line E 'JointReturnInd').
Form 2439, 'ShareholderSSN' must have a value.
If Form 2439 is present in the return, then 'RegInvstCoOrReInvstTrustName' must have a value.
If Form 2439 is present in the return, then 'RICOrREITEIN' must have a value.
Form 2555, Line 10 'BonaFideResidenceBeginDt' or Line 16 'PhysicalPresenceBeginDt' must have a value.
Form 461,'FilingStatusThresholdCd' must have the value ["626000" if the filing status of the return is married filing jointly] or "313000" for all other filing status.
Form 4952, Line 1 'InvestmentInterestExpenseAmt' or Line 2 'PriorYrDisallowInvsmtIntExpAmt' or Line 8 'InvestmentInterestExpDeductAmt' must have a non-zero value.
At least one of the following must have a non-zero value on Form 4972: Line 7 'CapitalGainTimesElectionPctAmt' or Line 8 'LumpSumDistriOrdinaryIncmAmt' or Line 29 'LumpSumRsdlAnnuityAvgTaxAmt'.
Form 5471 'EmployerEIN' or 'ForeignEntityReferenceIdNum' must have a value.
A Binary attachment with the description "7204SignaturePage" must be present in the return.
Form 8082, Line 3 'PassThroughEntityEIN' must have a value.
Form 8082, Line 4 'PassThroughEntityName' must have a value.
There must be at least one checkbox 'InjuredSpouseInd' checked on Form 8379, Line 10.
Form 8615, 'ChildInvestmentIncomeAmt' must be greater than 2700.
Form 8621 'SSN' must have a value.
F8621, 'PFICOrQEFEIN' or 'ForeignEntityReferenceIdNum' must have a value.
Form 8814, 'ChildInvestmentIncomeAmt' must be greater than 1350 and less than 13500.
Form 8814, 'ChildSSN' must be within the valid range of SSN/ITIN/ATIN.
If Form 8815, 'ExclBondIntModifiedAGIAmt' is less than 179,250, then filing status in the return must be Married filing jointly.
If Form 8815, 'ExclBondIntModifiedAGIAmt' is less than 114500, then filing status in the return must be Single or Head of household or Qualifying surviving spouse.
Form 8833 'EIN' or 'SSN' or 'ForeignEntityReferenceIdNum' must have a value.

At least one of the following must be checked on Form 8835 unless 'FacilityRqrNotStsfdInd' is checked: 'ProjectNetOutputUnder1MWInd' or 'FcltyConstrBeganBfrSpcfdDtInd' or 'FcltyStsfyWgAprntcshpRqrInd'.

At least one of the following must be checked on Form 8835 unless 'ACNameplateCapNAInd' is checked: 'ACNameplateCapSolarEgyPropInd', or 'ACNameplateCapWindEgyPropInd', or 'ACNameplateCapOthEgyPropInd'.
Form 8838P 'GainDeferralContributionGrp' or 'ContriNotSubjGainDeferralGrp' must have a value.
Each 'ChildSSN' on Form 8839 must be within the valid range of SSN/ITIN/ATIN.
Form 8853 'LTCInsurancePolicyHolderSSN' must be within the valid range of SSN/ITIN and must not be an ATIN.
Form 8853, 'LTCInsuredSSN' must be within the valid range of SSN/ITIN and must not be an ATIN.
Form 8858, Line 1b(1), 'EIN' in 'FDEOrFBUSIdNumberDetail' or Line 1b(2) 'ForeignEntityReferenceIdNum' must have a value.
Form 8865 'ForeignPartnershipEIN' or 'ForeignEntityReferenceIdNum' must have a value.
Form 8881, 'PensionPlanStartupCostsCrAmt' must have a non-zero value if an amount is entered.
'DepositorAccountNum' on Form 8888 must not be all zeros.
Form 8959, Line 12 'SEIncomeSubjToAddSETaxAmt' must be equal to Line 8 'TotalSelfEmploymentIncomeAmt' minus (-) Line 11 'MedcrWagesTipsBelowThrshldAmt'.

At least one of the following must have a non-zero value on Form 8962: 'AnnualPremiumAmt' or 'AnnualPremiumSLCSPAmt' or 'AnnualAdvancedPTCAmt' or 'MonthlyPremiumAmt' or 'MonthlyPremiumSLCSPAmt' or 'MonthlyAdvancedPTCAmt'.
A return containing Form 8992 must include a Schedule A (Form 8992) or Schedule B (Form 8992).
Form 926, 'TransfereeEIN' or 'ForeignEntityReferenceIdNum' must have a value.
In Form 9465, one of the following must have a value: Line 3 Home 'PhoneNum' or Line 4 Work 'PhoneNum' or Line 3 Home 'ForeignPhoneNum' or Line 4 Work 'ForeignPhoneNum'.
Form W-2, 'WagesAmt' must have a value greater than zero unless Combat Pay and/or Third-Party Sick Pay has been excluded from income.
'PreparerSSN' in the Return Header must not be all zeros or all nines.
IP Address of the Transmitter must have a value.
Timestamp of the Transmitter must have a value.
If 'TotalPaymentsAmt' in the return is not equal to 'TotalTaxAmt', then one of the following must have a non-zero value: 'OverpaidAmt' or 'RefundAmt' or 'AppliedToEsTaxAmt' or 'OwedAmt'.
'DeviceId' in 'AtSubmissionCreationGrp' in 'FilingSecurityInformation' in the Return Header must have a value.

afterAdd.label: after_tadd_standard_deduction
